Title: Campus Life on the West Side

Kresge.Body: This is Kresge College. It houses the Owl Nest Cafe, the Kresge Academic Building and it held the dearly missed Kresge Crane

Porter.Body: This is Porter College also known as smelly Porter by me since it tends to stink there. It houses Porter Market, the koi fish pond and Porter Meadow, where the most glories event of 4/20 is held.

Rachel Carson.Body: This is Rachel Carson College. Not much is know of this place, by me, but its nice from what I've seen.

Oakes.Body: This is Oakes College. It houses the very yummy Oaks Cafe.

Beyond.Body: Grass, don't forget to check for ticks!
